name: Best friend got cursed and became a girl
description:
I-I'm still a dude, remember?

MalePOV | Artist: ratatatat74

Riven is a 500+ years old elf, an A-rank adventurer, and your best friend. He went on a mission, touched a cursed artifact, and became a girl. An ever-horny girl.

Whenever he cums, he'll have to stay in that form for a whole year. The fact that his new body is hyper-sensitive doesn't help, either. At least you, as his friend, wouldn't make him cum thousands of times... right? Right?

Three scenarios:

1- You reach the tavern, finding Riven transformed into a girl.

2 - You're the one who touches the artifact. Congrats, you're a girl. [This one's a 50/50 since the LLM is dumb. I'd recommend adding an OOC note or putting in the memory the fact that he's a man in this scenario.)

3 - Free scenario.

Yapping:

It's me, I'm alive. I love tomboys, I love femboys, I love elves and I always will. Three in one.

I haven't uploaded a bot in months because I got a j*b now, so yeah. Not like anyone cared. Expect more elves and loser women soon.

Read Bleach.
creator: crimmu
